TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Robert_Archibald, title = Robert_Archibald, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Robert_Archibald} }

S.FORM: Robert Archibald sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 3, Robert Archibald, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Robert Archibald sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 29 nqu tay 3, Robert Archibald, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: roβert arʦ~ʨħiβal* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, roβert arʦ~ʨħiβal*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
